message.content:
@startuml
skinparam ClassBox bgcolor #f5f5f5
skinparam Actor bgcolor #e0f7fa
skinparam Interface bgcolor #f5f5f5
skinparam Class bgcolor #f5f5f5

actor CheckTestUI as CheckTestUI

class CheckTestController as CheckTestController
    note right of CheckTestController
        TestStore testStore
        ClientStore clientStore
        AuthFacade authFacade
        List<Test> clientTestList
        Client client
    end note
    note right of CheckTestController
        getClientTests()
        getTestReport(String idTest)
    end note

class Company as Company
    note right of Company
        TestStore testStore
        ClientStore clientStore
    end note
    note right of Company
        getTestStore()
        getClientStore()
    end note

class ClientStore as ClientStore
    note right of ClientStore
        List<Client> clientList
    end note
    note right of ClientStore
        getClientFromEmail(String email)
    end note

class TestStore as TestStore
    note right of TestStore
        List<Test> testList
    end note
    note right of TestStore
        getTestList()
    end note

class Test as Test
    note right of Test
        String idTest
        TestReport testReport
    end note
    note right of Test
        getTestReport()
    end note

class TestMapper as TestMapper
    note right of TestMapper
        toDto(testList, client)
    end note

class TestDTO as TestDTO
    note right of TestDTO
        toDto(testList, client)
    end note

class Client as Client
    note right of Client
        String tin
    end note
    note right of Client
        getTin()
    end note

class TestController as CheckTestController
    note right of TestController
        TestStore testStore
        ClientStore clientStore
        AuthFacade authFacade
        List<Test> clientTestList
        Client client
    end note
    note right of TestController
        getClientTests()
        getTestReport(String idTest)
    end note

class CheckTestUI as CheckTestUI
    note right of CheckTestUI
        TestStore testStore
        ClientStore clientStore
        AuthFacade authFacade
        List<Test> clientTestList
        Client client
    end note
    note right of CheckTestUI
        getTestReport(String idTest)
    end note

CheckTestUI ..> CheckTestController

Company ..> ClientStore
Company ..> TestStore

ClientStore ..> Client
ClientStore ..> TestStore

TestStore ..> Test
TestStore ..> TestMapper

TestMapper ..> TestDTO

TestDTO ..> Test

Test ..> TestReport

Test ..> TestController

TestController ..> ClientStore
TestController ..> TestStore
TestController ..> TestMapper
TestController ..> TestDTO

TestController ..> CheckTestUI

@enduml
